# PERF-143-comment negative: only a comment mentions http.Handle; no real registration
lang: go
file: PERF-143-comment-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

// NewMiddleware returns a wrapper for chaining middleware.
//
//	rl := middleware.NewMiddleware(limiter, opts)
//	http.Handle("/api", rl(myHandler))
func NewMiddleware(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}
